channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Cubs look to clinch NLCS berth with win over Brewers in Game 5 of NLDS
item.description: CHICAGO — The Chicago Cubs are looking to keep their season going after digging themselves out of a ditch this week to push the NL Division Series to a decisive Game 5.
item.dc:creator: Gabriel Castillo, WGN 9

item.title: Wilson scores 31 and Aces win 3rd WNBA title in 4 seasons, beating Mercury 97-86 for 4-game sweep
item.description: PHOENIX (AP) — A'ja Wilson put in work in the paint, getting bucket after bucket despite multiple defenders draped all over her. She got plenty of help from Chelsea Gray, Jewell Loyd and Dana Evans. The trio started raining 3s early in the second quarter.
item.dc:creator: DAVID BRANDT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Penn State seeks rebound against Northwestern: Nittany Nation
item.description: STATE COLLEGE, Pa. (AP) — The pain and anger was just beginning for Penn State players as handfuls of UCLA fans stormed the Rose Bowl to celebrate their Bruins’ upset win on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: TRAVIS JOHNSON, PHL 17

item.title: Family affair: Vacherot stuns Djokovic and will face cousin Rinderknech in Shanghai Masters final
item.description: Two cousins will meet in the final of the Shanghai Open after qualifier Valentin Vacherot stunned a hobbled Novak Djokovic and relative Arthur Rinderknech fought back to beat Daniil Medvedev.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Polanco hits winning single in the 15th inning as the Mariners beat the Tigers to advance to ALCS
item.description: SEATTLE (AP) — Jorge Polanco hit a game-ending single in the 15th inning, and the Seattle Mariners advanced to the AL Championship Series by outlasting the Detroit Tigers for a 3-2 victory Friday night in the longest winner-take-all postseason game in baseball history.
item.dc:creator: LUKE OLSON, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: No. 24 South Florida scores 4 TDs in a 3 1/2-minute span and hands North Texas its 1st loss
item.description: DENTON, Texas (AP) — Byrum Brown threw three touchdown passes and ran for two more scores, Jhalyn Shuler returned a fumble 34 yards for South Florida's fourth TD in span of 3 1/2 minutes and the No. 24 Bulls beat North Texas 63-36 on Friday night, handing the Mean Green their first loss this season.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN HAWKINS, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Phoenix Mercury coach Nate Tibbetts ejected from WNBA Finals Game 4 after heated argument
item.description: PHOENIX (AP) — Phoenix Mercury coach Nate Tibbetts was ejected from Game 4 of the WNBA Finals after receiving two quick technical fouls in the third quarter against the Las Vegas Aces on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: DAVID BRANDT and DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Led by A'ja Wilson, the Las Vegas Aces have become a WNBA dynasty
item.description: A'ja Wilson and the Las Vegas Aces are in rarified air. The franchise won its third WNBA championship in four seasons, completing a sweep of Phoenix in the best-of-seven Finals on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Joe Flacco reacts to fresh start with Bengals, shares motivation behind drive to compete in NFL
item.description: Joe Flacco spoke to the media for the first time since his trade to the Bengals. The Super Bowl winner said he's eager to prove he can still play at a high level in the NFL.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Browns name Shedeur Sanders backup quarterback following Joe Flacco trade to Bengals
item.description: Cleveland Browns head coach Kevin Stefanski announced Friday that Shedeur Sanders will be the backup quarterback in their game against the Pittsburgh Steelers.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: NFL is reviewing how concussion protocol was followed for Giants rookie QB Jaxson Dart
item.description: The NFL has initiated a review of the concussion protocol used in the evaluation of New York Giants rookie quarterback Jaxson Dart in the second half of the team's game against Philadelphia. The league announced Friday the review will be conducted jointly with the NFL Players Association.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Padres' Iglesias suspended 1 game, Bogaerts fined for dispute with umpires after season-ending loss
item.description: San Diego Padres infielder Jose Iglesias has been suspended for one game and fined for unprofessional conduct toward the umpires during the final game of the club’s Wild Card Series against the Cubs.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Shedeur Sanders promoted to Browns backup QB, will be behind rookie Dillon Gabriel against Steelers
item.description: BEREA, Ohio (AP) — Shedeur Sanders has waited patiently for his chance to play for Cleveland. He's real close.
item.dc:creator: TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: WNBA needs Caitlin Clark more than she needs the league, longtime sportscaster Dan Patrick says
item.description: Longtime sportscaster Dan Patrick said the WNBA needs Caitlin Clark more than she needs the league during a recent appearance on OutKick's "Don't @ Me with Dan Dakich.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Steelers LB Nick Herbig is morphing from TJ Watt's protégé into a star in his own right
item.description: PITTSBURGH (AP) — Nick Herbig doesn't look the part of a menace. At least not by NFL standards anyway. The undersized Pittsburgh Steelers outside linebacker plays like one anyway. Yes, Herbig knows he doesn't fit the prototypical body type of an elite edge rusher.
item.dc:creator: WILL GRAVES, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Zlatan Ibrahimovic explains how Fabio Capello taught him to demand respect and become a superstar
item.description: ROME (AP) — When Zlatan Ibrahimovic walked into a Serie A locker room for the first time at age 22 and saw the likes of Alessandro Del Piero, David Trezeguet and Gianluigi Buffon staring at him, he acknowledges that it felt like a “fantasy world.
item.dc:creator: ANDREW DAMPF, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Manchester is saying its last goodbye to boxing icon Ricky Hatton
item.description: MANCHESTER, England (AP) — Manchester is saying its last goodbye to boxing icon Ricky Hatton. The former world champion died last month aged 46. His funeral was being held Friday in the city’s cathedral and fans lined up as the cortège made its way through the streets.
item.dc:creator: JAMES ROBSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Indonesia to block Israeli team from competing at gymnastics world championships in Jakarta
item.description: JAKARTA, Indonesia (AP) — Indonesia will block Israeli athletes from competing at the upcoming gymnastics world championships in Jakarta, a government official said Thursday.
item.dc:creator: NINIEK KARMINI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Mammoth drop opener at Colorado, 2-1
item.description: DENVER (ABC4 Sports) - For the second straight year, Dylan Guenther scored the first goal of the season, but that was the only goal the Utah Mammoth scored in a season-opening 2-1 loss to the Colorado Avalanche Thursday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Athlete of the Week: Ella Jackson
item.description: Ella Jackson is the KREX Exceptional athlete of the week. She is a softball player at Rifle High School.
item.dc:creator: KREX 5

item.title: Eagles get blown out by Giants after running tush push play 4 straight times, inciting backlash
item.description: Giants rookies Jaxson Dart and Cam Skattebo shined in blowout win against Eagles, while Philadelphia's controversial tush push plays draw criticism.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Voice of the Tampa Bay Buccaneers shares his favorite game call
item.description: If you're a Bucs fan, chances are Gene Deckerhoff has graced the airwaves as the play-by-play announcer for the Tampa Bay Buccaneers.
item.dc:creator: Will Richardson, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Caleb Williams joins investment group backing NWSL's Boston Legacy FC
item.description: Caleb Williams and his investment firm, 888 Meidas, have joined the investment group of the Boston Legacy Football Club, a soon-to-be member of the National Women's Soccer League, alongside other notable athletes and celebrities.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Tampa Bay Lightning kick off NHL season with home opener against Senators
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (WFLA)— The Tampa Bay Lightning kicks off the 2025-26 NHL season against the Ottawa Senators at Benchmark International Arena tonight.
item.dc:creator: Ashley Suter, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Bucs' Baker Mayfield named FedEx Air & Ground NFL Player of the Week
item.description: Buccaneers quarterback Baker Mayfield was named a FedEx Air & Ground Player of the Week for Week 5 after leading the team to a 38-35 victory over the Seattle Seahawks.
item.dc:creator: Sierra Rains, WFLA, NBC
